name: Sid Wyche
abstract: Sidney Jackson Wyche  (February 11, 1922 – November 11, 1983) was an American songwriter and pianist. Wyche is best known for writing the jazz standard "Alright, Okay, You Win", Elvis Presley's Billboard Hot 100 chart-topper "A Big Hunk o' Love", and the Jackie Wilson hits "A Woman, a Lover, a Friend" and "Talk That Talk".

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy McRae
about_quotes.evidence: So I started writing with him. ... I was writing with Sid Wyche
